3e8650ac-7924-4f46-aa02-a1a3693203b9.content:
VTU    CGPA     Conversion        Formula     Document                                                                                                                                                    

            To  convert  VTU  CGPA    to percentage,   use the  following formula:  Percentage   = (CGPA    -  0.75)  * 10.                                                                                           

            For example,   if  your  CGPA  is  8.0,  your  percentage  is (8.0  -  0.75)  *  10 =  7.25  * 10  = 72.5%.                                                                                               

            This formula  is official  and  applies  to all engineering  batches  under  VTU.
